---
title: "Descriptive Statistics"
subtitle: ""
author: "Pedro Cardoso-Leite"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../../../assets/revealjs_themes/teaching.scss]
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    revealjs-plugins:
      - pointer
---



# How to describe data?

## Zooming in...

 - size of the data
 - shape of the data table
 - types of columns (data types)
 - distribution of values within a column
 - relationships between columns


# Exercise

##

Have a look at the "describe-data" folder in the sem-labs repository:

[https://github.com/xcit-courses/sem-labs](https://github.com/xcit-courses/sem-labs)


<br>

Answer the first two questions:

 - size of the data
 - shape of the data table





# Descriptive Statistics



## Types of variables / measurement levels

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}

- String
- Boolean/Logical
- Double/Float/Numeric/Integer
- Ordered Categorical/Factor
- UnOrdered Categorical/Factor
- ...


:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

- Nominal
- Ordinal
- Interval
- Ratio

:::
:::




## Describing 1 variable


- Central Tendency
- Variability
- Other




## Relationship between two variables



# Exercises

 - describe-data/compute-basic-stats.qmd
 - describe-data/describe-data.qmd
